subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! A handmaiden from among Thy handmaidens hath believed in Thee in this Revelation wherein Thou hast manifested Thyself unto the people [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی امه من امائک آمنت بک فی هذا الظهور الذی تجلیت به علی اهل
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for women, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @prayer for protection, @suffering and imprisonment
